title: Set up Better Auth v1 for Next.js
summary: Install better-auth, configure the server, generate the database schema, and add sign-in/sign-out to a Next.js App Router project.
declaration: I will set up Better Auth v1 — a self-hosted, database-backed auth library. This uses your existing Prisma or Drizzle database; no external auth service is required. If you want a third-party hosted service like Clerk or Supabase Auth, say so before I begin.
